rawOpportunities.title: AWS Activate Credits
rawOpportunities.reward_value_text: Up to $100,000 in AWS Activate Credits
eligibility_bullets: AWS Account on a Paid Tier Plan
For Activate Portfolio: Associated with an Activate Provider (e.g., VC or Investor) and have an Organizational ID
rawOpportunities.summary: AWS Activate provides startups with up to $100,000 in credits to build, grow, and scale. For AI startups, these credits are specifically redeemable on third-party foundation models from companies like Anthropic, Meta, and Mistral AI via Amazon Bedrock.
evidence_snippets: Eligible startups can apply to receive up to $100,000 in credits to build, grow, and scale.
Activate Portfolio offers up to $100,000 USD AWS Activate Credits for startups associated with an Activate Provider
AWS Activate Credits are redeemable on third-party models on Amazon Bedrock
To be eligible for AWS Activate Credits, startups must be pre-series B, have a company website or company profile, be founded in the last 10 years and have an AWS Account on Paid Tier Plan.

rawEventLog.goal:
Navigate to https://aws.amazon.com/startups/credits to complete the goal: # TinyFish Goal Template

Use strict JSON output.

Template:

You are extracting current opportunities from the given website.
Return strict JSON only.
Schema:
[
  {
    "title": "string",
    "issuer": "string | null",
    "source_url": "string",
    "application_url": "string | null",
    "source_type": "grant | accelerator | tender | other",
    "reward_value_text": "string | null",
    "deadline_text": "string | null",
    "geography": "string | null",
    "eligibility_bullets": ["string"],
    "summary": "string | null",
    "evidence_snippets": ["string"]
  }
]

Rules:
- if unknown, use null
- do not fabricate amounts or deadlines
- keep evidence snippets short and literal

Objective title: AI startup live opportunity proof

Objective query: AI startup cloud credit program with explicit benefits and application details

Profile: Seed-stage startup building AI developer tools with a small engineering team.

Preferred geography: Global

Sectors: AI, developer tools, cloud

Constraints: Prefer explicit credit amounts, benefits, and application details

Source label: AWS Activate

Source type: grant

Source URL: https://aws.amazon.com/startups/credits

Only return opportunities that are relevant to the objective and supported by literal evidence snippets from the source.
